testcase.name: Auth — page loads › @smoke login page renders form fields
Auth — page loads › @smoke register page renders
Auth — page loads › @smoke forgot-password page renders
Auth — page loads › @smoke reset-password page without token shows invalid link state
Auth — page loads › login page has "Forgot your password?" link
Auth — login validation › submit with empty form is blocked
Auth — login validation › invalid email format shows validation error
Auth — login validation › wrong credentials shows error message
Auth — login validation › unauthenticated user redirected from /dashboard to /login
Auth — login validation › unauthenticated user redirected from /residents to /login
Auth — login validation › unauthenticated user redirected from /billing to /login
Auth — login flow › valid credentials redirect to dashboard
Auth — login flow › dashboard shows after login
Auth — login flow › JWT stored in localStorage after login
Auth — login flow › logout clears token and redirects to /login
Auth — registration › register new org via UI redirects to dashboard
testcase.error:
[chromium] › auth.spec.ts:132:7 › Auth — registration › register new org via UI redirects to dashboard
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/dashboard" until "load" ============================================================
147 | 148 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); > 149 | await page.waitForURL('**/dashboard', { timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 150 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/dashboard/); 151 | }); 152 | at /Users/jvincent1/Downloads/KinCare/e2e/tests/auth.spec.ts:149:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-Auth-—-registration-r-5ebc4-a-UI-redirects-to-dashboard-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/auth-Auth-—-registration-r-5ebc4-a-UI-redirects-to-dashboard-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: Auth — registration › register with duplicate email shows error

failure.message: Register failed: 429 API calls quota exceeded! maximum admitted 3 per 1m.

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth.spec.ts:153:7 › Auth — registration › register with duplicate email shows error
Error: Register failed: 429 API calls quota exceeded! maximum admitted 3 per 1m.
expect(received).toBeTruthy()
Received: false
at helpers/auth.helper.ts:75
73 | 74 | const res = await request.post(`${API_URL}/api/onboarding/register`, { data: payload }); > 75 | expect(res.ok(), `Register failed: ${res.status()} ${await res.text()}`).toBeTruthy(); | ^ 76 | const body = await res.json(); 77 | return { accessToken: body.accessToken, email }; 78 | } at registerNewOrg (/Users/jvincent1/Downloads/KinCare/e2e/tests/helpers/auth.helper.ts:75:76) at /Users/jvincent1/Downloads/KinCare/e2e/tests/auth.spec.ts:155:23
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-Auth-—-registration-r-87348-duplicate-email-shows-error-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Auth — password reset › forgot-password always shows success (anti-enumeration)
Auth — password reset › API request-password-reset returns 200 for unknown email
Auth — password reset › API reset-password with invalid token returns 400
Auth — password reset › reset-password page with valid ?token param shows form
Auth — API contract › POST /api/auth/login returns accessToken, refreshToken, role
Auth — API contract › POST /api/auth/refresh rotates token
Auth — API contract › protected endpoint returns 401 without token
Auth — API contract › protected endpoint returns 401 with malformed token
Health & Infrastructure › @smoke API health endpoint returns 200
Health & Infrastructure › @smoke Angular app loads at /
Health & Infrastructure › @smoke / redirects to /login
Health & Infrastructure › @smoke unknown route redirects to /login
Health & Infrastructure › API swagger docs accessible in development
Health & Infrastructure › API returns JSON for error responses (not HTML)
Security — rate limiting › POST /api/auth/login rate-limited at 5 attempts/min
Security — input validation › resident firstName over 100 chars returns 400

testcase.name: Security — response headers › API responses have no stack traces in errors
Security — response headers › health endpoint is public
Security — response headers › tracking endpoint is public for valid token
Security — webhook protection › POST /webhook/twilio without signature returns 403
Security — webhook protection › POST /webhook/broker without signature returns 401
